heading: Accounts and recordkeeping
label: 81p Accounts and recordkeeping
notes: Amendments1986—Subsec. (b). , substituted “reports on zone operations” for “reports containing a full statement of all the operations, receipts, and expenditures, and such other information as the Board may require”.Pub. L. 99–386, § 203(b)(1)Subsec. (c). , added subsec. (c) and struck out former subsec. (c) which required the Board to make an annual report to Congress containing a summary of the operation and fiscal condition of each zone, and transmit copies of the annual report of each grantee.Pub. L. 99–386, § 203(b)(2)1980—Subsec. (c). substituted “by April 1 of each year” for “on the first day of each regular session”.Pub. L. 96–609
amendments: Amendments1986—Subsec. children.heading: Manner of keeping accounts
children.label: a Manner of keeping accounts
children.text: The form and manner of keeping the accounts of each zone shall be prescribed by the Board.

children.heading: Annual report by grantee
children.label: b Annual report by grantee
children.text: Each grantee shall make to the Board annually, and at such other times as it may prescribe, reports on zone operations.

children.heading: Report to Congress
children.label: c Report to Congress
children.text: The Board shall make a report to Congress annually containing a summary of zone operations.
